textAr: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
textEn: The Hour has drawn near and the moon has split asunder.
textTranslit: Iqtarabatis Saa'atu wsan shaqqal qamar

textAr: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
textEn: Whenever they see a sign, they turn away and say, “Same old magic!”
textTranslit: Wa iny yaraw aayatany yu'ridoo wa yaqooloo sihrum mustamirr

textAr: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
textEn: They deny [the truth] and follow their desires, but every matter will reach its inevitable end.
textTranslit: Wa kazzaboo wattaba'ooo ahwaaa'ahum; wa kullu amrim mustaqirr

textAr: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
textEn: There have already come to them stories [of destroyed nations] that are sufficient to deter them,
textTranslit: Wa laqad jaaa'ahum minal ambaaa'i maa feehi muzdajar

textAr: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
textEn: which contain extensive wisdom, but the warnings are of no avail.
textTranslit: Hikmatum baalighatun famaa tughnin nuzur

textAr: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
textEn: So turn away from them [O Prophet]. On the Day when the caller will summon them to a horrific event,
textTranslit: Fatawalla 'anhum; yawma yad'ud daa'i ilaa shai 'in nukur

textAr: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
textEn: with eyes downcast, they will come out of the graves like scattered locusts,
textTranslit: khushsha'an absaaruhum yakrujoona minal ajdaasi ka annahum jaraadum muntashir

textAr: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
textEn: rushing headlong towards the caller. The disbelievers will say, “This is a hard Day!”
textTranslit: Muhti'eena ilad daa'i yaqoolul kafiroona haazaa yawmun 'asir

textAr: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
textEn: The people of Noah rejected [the truth] before them; they rejected Our slave and said, “He is a madman,” and he was intimidated.
textTranslit: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohin fakazzaboo 'abdanaa wa qaaloo majnoo nunw wazdujir

textAr: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
textEn: So he called upon his Lord, “I am overpowered, so help me!”
textTranslit: Fada'aa Rabbahooo annee maghloobun fantasir

textAr: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
textEn: So We opened the gates of the sky with water pouring down in torrents,
textTranslit: Fafatahnaaa abwaabas sa maaa'i bimaa'im munhamir

textAr: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
textEn: and We caused the earth to burst forth with springs, then the waters met for a preordained purpose.
textTranslit: Wa fajjamal arda 'uyoonan faltaqal maaa'u 'alaaa amrin qad qudir

textAr: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
textEn: We carried him on an [Ark made] of planks and nails,
textTranslit: Wa hamalnaahu 'alaa zaati alwaahinw wa dusur

textAr: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
textEn: sailing under Our [Watchful] Eyes; as a reward for the one [they] denied.
textTranslit: Tajree bi a'yuninaa jazaaa 'al liman kaana kufir

textAr: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have certainly left it as a sign; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqat taraknaahaad aayatan fahal mim muddakir

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: Then how were My punishment and My warnings?
textTranslit: Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have certainly made the Qur’an easy to understand and remember; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad yassamal Quraana liz zikri fahal mimmuddakir

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: ‘Ād disbelieved. Then how were My punishment and My warnings?
textTranslit: Kazzabat 'Aadun fakaifa kaana 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
textEn: We sent against them a furious wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
textTranslit: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim reehan sarsaran fee Yawmi nahsim mustamirr

textAr: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
textEn: sweeping people away, as if they were trunks of uprooted palm trees.
textTranslit: Tanzi;un naasa ka anna huma'jaazu nakhlim munqa'ir

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: Then how were My punishment and My warnings?
textTranslit: 'Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have certainly made the Qur’an easy to understand and remember; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad yassamal Quraana liz zikri fahal mim muddakir

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: Thamūd rejected the warnings,
textTranslit: Kazzabat Samoodu binnuzur

textAr: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
textEn: They said, “Shall we follow a single human being from among us? Then we would surely be in error and insanity!
textTranslit: Faqaalooo a-basharam minnaa waahidan nattabi'uhooo innaa izal lafee dalaalinw wa su'ur

textAr: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
textEn: Has the revelation been sent down upon him out of all of us? Rather, he is an insolent liar.”
textTranslit: 'A-ulqiyaz zikru 'alaihi mim baininaa bal huwa kazzaabun ashir

textAr: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
textEn: Tomorrow they will know who the insolent liar is.
textTranslit: Sa-ya'lamoona ghadam manil kazzaabul ashir

textAr: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
textEn: We are sending the she-camel as a test for them, so watch them [O Sālih] and be patient,
textTranslit: Innaa mursilun naaqati fitnatal lahum fartaqibhum wastabir

textAr: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
textEn: and tell them that the water is to be shared between them; each should take its drink in turn.
textTranslit: Wa nabbi'hum annal maaa'a qismatum bainahum kullu shirbim muhtadar

textAr: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
textEn: But they called their companion, and he undertook the task and hamstrung her.
textTranslit: Fanaadaw saahibahum fata'aataa fa'aqar

textAr: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: Then how [terrible] My punishment and My warnings were!
textTranslit: Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
textEn: We sent against them a single blast, leaving them like trampled hedge-building twigs.
textTranslit: Innaaa arsalnaa 'alaihim saihatanw waahidatan fakaano kahasheemil muhtazir

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have certainly made the Qur’an easy to understand and remember; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad yassarnal quraana liz zikri fahal mim muddakir

textAr: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: The people of Lot rejected the warnings.
textTranslit: Kazzabat qawmu lootim binnuzur

textAr: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
textEn: We sent against them a storm of pebbles, except the family of Lot whom We saved before dawn,
textTranslit: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim haasiban illaaa aala Loot najjainaahum bisahar

textAr: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
textEn: as a blessing from Us. Thus do We reward those who give thanks.
textTranslit: Ni'matam min 'indinaa; kazaalika najzee man shakar

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
textEn: He had already warned them of Our punishing assault, but they doubted the warnings.
textTranslit: Wa laqad anzarahum batshatanaa fatamaaraw binnuzur

textAr: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: They even demanded that he let them have their way with his angel-guests, so We blinded their eyes, [saying], “Taste My punishment and My warnings!”
textTranslit: Wa laqad raawadoohu 'andaifee fatamasnaaa a'yunahum fazooqoo 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
textEn: By the early morning a lasting torment overtook them.
textTranslit: Wa laqad sabbahahum bukratan 'azaabum mustaqirr

textAr: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
textEn: Taste My punishment and My warnings!
textTranslit: Fazooqoo 'azaabee wa nuzur

textAr: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have certainly made the Qur’an easy to understand and remember; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad yassarnal Quraana liz zikri fahal mim muddakir

textAr: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
textEn: Indeed, warnings came to the people of Pharaoh.
textTranslit: Wa laqad jaaa'a Aala Fir'awnan nuzur

textAr: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
textEn: But they rejected all of Our signs, so We seized them with the grip of the All-Mighty, Most Powerful.
textTranslit: Kazzaboo bi Aayaatinaa kullihaa fa akhaznaahum akhza 'azeezim muqtadir

textAr: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
textEn: Are your disbelievers [O Makkans] superior to those or have you been granted immunity in divine Scriptures?
textTranslit: Akuffaarukum khairum min ulaaa'ikum am lakum baraaa'atun fiz Zubur

textAr: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
textEn: Or do they say, “We are a united front, bound to prevail.”?
textTranslit: Am yaqooloona nahnu jamee'um muntasir

textAr: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
textEn: Soon their united front will be defeated, and they will flee.
textTranslit: Sa yuhzamul jam'u wa yuwalloonad dubur

textAr: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
textEn: But the Hour is their appointed time, and the Hour is more catastrophic and more bitter.
textTranslit: Balis Saa'atu maw'iduhum was Saa'atu adhaa wa amarr

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
textEn: Indeed, the wicked are in error and blazes.
textTranslit: Innal mujrimeena fee dalaalinw wa su'ur

textAr: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
textEn: On the Day when they will be dragged into the Fire on their faces, [they will be told], “Taste the agony of Hell!”
textTranslit: Yawma yushaboona fin Naari'alaa wujoohimim zooqoo massa saqar

textAr: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
textEn: We have surely created everything in a determined measure.
textTranslit: Innaa kulla shai'in khalaqnaahu biqadar

textAr: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
textEn: Our command is but a single word, which is fulfilled in the blink of an eye.
textTranslit: Wa maaa amrunaaa illaa waahidatun kalamhim bilbasar

textAr: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
textEn: We have destroyed many like you [O Makkans]; is there anyone to take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad ahlaknaaa ashyaa'akum fahal mim muddakir

textAr: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
textEn: Everything they did is in the written records,
textTranslit: Wa kullu shai'in fa'aloohu fiz Zubur

textAr: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
textEn: and everything, small or big, is written down.
textTranslit: Wa kullu sagheerinw wa kabeerim mustatar

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and rivers,
textTranslit: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw wa nahar

textAr: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
textEn: seated in honor in the presence of the Most Powerful Sovereign.
textTranslit: Fee maq'adi sidqin 'inda Maleekim Muqtadir
